name: uncommon-favor
description: Dawn Staley's memoir of rising from North Philly projects to basketball stardom and championship coaching — discipline, community, service, and being a ladder of hope for others.
useCase: Building discipline, beating the odds, navigating spaces where you don't belong, paying success forward through service, and leading with character.
knownRisks: This is a personal memoir, not a leadership or coaching manual
Some specific lessons may not translate to non-sports contexts
Staley's experience at UVA in the 1980s may differ from the college experience today
